title: Kenyan Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful dish combining the best of Kenyan and stir-fry cuisines. This recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: stir
ingredients.notes: such as bell peppers, carrots, and broccoli

instructions: Heat a pan over medium-high heat.
Add 1 tsp of salty and 1 tsp of gooey to the pan and stir until fragrant.
Add 1 cup of Kenyan and 2 cups mixed vegetables to the pan and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes.
Add 1/2 cup shredded cheese to the pan and stir until the cheese is melted and the vegetables are tender.
